S.FORM: Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 4, Roch Marc Christian Kabor√©, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Burkina faso ta' misuw hya' ga Roch Marc Christian Kabor√©, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ro ¶~ ®ńß mar ¶~ ® ¶~ ®ńßris~…ētian kaő≤or* rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ro ¶~ ®ńß mar ¶~ ® ¶~ ®ńßris~…ētian kaő≤or*, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤urkina *as~…ēo ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ro ¶~ ®ńß mar ¶~ ® ¶~ ®ńßris~…ētian kaő≤or*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
